apiKeys.title: API Keys
apiKeys.description: Manage your API keys for OPDS access and apps
apiKeys.noKeys: You don't have any API keys yet. Create one to use with OPDS readers or apps.
apiKeys.limitReached: You have reached the maximum number of API keys. Revoke one to create a new one.

createDialog.title: Create API Key
createDialog.description: Give your key a name so you can recognize it later.
createDialog.nameHint: Optional. A default name is used if left blank.

createdDialog.title: API Key Created
createdDialog.warning: Copy this key now. You won't be able to see it again!
createdDialog.instructions: Use this key as your password when connecting to OPDS. Your username is your email address.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke API Key
revokeDialog.description: Are you sure you want to revoke this API key? Any device or app using this key will no longer be able to access your library.
